info.title: Little Imp daemon API
info.description: Local-only REST and MCP API exposed by littleimpd.

get.summary: Return daemon health, version, uptime, and queue size.
Return a redacted local diagnostics bundle for support.
get.description: Diagnostics are generated locally and omit API keys, URL credentials, query strings, PIN hashes, S3 credentials, and backup passwords.

get.summary: Check a GitHub Releases-compatible source for a newer Little Imp release.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Update channel to check; defaults from the current package version

schema.description: Update channel to check; defaults from the current package version

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Public GitHub Releases-compatible JSON endpoint; private and loopback hosts are rejected

schema.description: Public GitHub Releases-compatible JSON endpoint; private and loopback hosts are rejected

502.description: Update source could not be read or returned an invalid response

post.summary: Save a URL and enqueue the ingestion pipeline.

409.description: URL already exists in trash or archive

422.description: Invalid URL or missing url field

get.summary: List active or archived bookmarks with filters and pagination.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter by exact category ID; takes precedence over category

schema.description: Filter by exact category ID; takes precedence over category

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

schema.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

schema.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

parameters.name: read_later
parameters.description: Filter by read-later state; accepts boolean strings or numeric flags

schema.description: Filter by read-later state; accepts boolean strings or numeric flags

parameters.name: is_pinned
parameters.description: Filter by pinned/starred state; accepts boolean strings or numeric flags

schema.description: Filter by pinned/starred state; accepts boolean strings or numeric flags

parameters.name: opened_count_min
parameters.description: Filter to bookmarks opened at least this many times

schema.description: Filter to bookmarks opened at least this many times

parameters.name: opened_count_max
parameters.description: Filter to bookmarks opened no more than this many times

schema.description: Filter to bookmarks opened no more than this many times

parameters.name: last_opened_from
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound for last opened time

schema.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound for last opened time

parameters.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound for last opened time

schema.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound for last opened time

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Sort direction; requires sort and defaults to desc when omitted

schema.description: Sort direction; requires sort and defaults to desc when omitted

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.summary: Return page-independent active-library aggregate counts.

get.summary: Get one bookmark with extracted content.

put.summary: Patch bookmark fields, tags, archive state, read state, and notes.

delete.summary: Soft-delete a bookmark by moving it to trash.

get.summary: Serve one cached local bookmark media file.
get.description: Media files are served from the local cache only. Missing files, trashed bookmarks, and unknown media IDs return 404.

post.summary: Record a user-triggered external open for a bookmark.
Restore a trashed bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark not found or not in trash

500.description: Restore succeeded but bookmark could not be fetched

404.description: Bookmark not found or not in trash

get.summary: List trashed bookmarks.
List semantically related bookmarks.
Get latest pipeline job and failure status for a bookmark.

post.summary: Retry pipeline work for one bookmark.
Dismiss the current non-blocking pipeline failure for a bookmark.

409.description: Blocking pipeline failure cannot be dismissed

post.summary: Enqueue durable reprocess or re-embed jobs for existing bookmarks.

422.description: Invalid mode or missing embedding configuration

get.summary: List categories as a tree with bookmark counts.

post.summary: Create a category.

get.summary: List tags with bookmark counts.

post.summary: Create a tag, idempotently returning an existing tag when present.

put.summary: Rename a tag without changing bookmark associations.
put.description: Duplicate target tag names are rejected with 409 rather than merged implicitly.

delete.summary: Delete a tag and detach it from bookmarks.

post.summary: Attach a tag to a bookmark.

delete.summary: Detach a tag from a bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark, tag, or attachment not found

get.summary: List domains with active bookmark counts.

post.summary: Preview a Netscape HTML bookmark export without mutating library data.

requestBody.description: Multipart body with a file field plus optional duplicatePolicy JSON and remapping JSON fields.

remapping.description: Optional JSON ImportRemappingInput. Folder create mappings use sourcePath and targetPath; folder existing mappings use sourcePath and categoryId. Tag existing mappings use sourceTag and tagId; new/renamed mappings use sourceTag and targetName; skipped mappings use only sourceTag.

422.description: Missing file, invalid bookmark export, or invalid duplicate policy

post.summary: Import a Netscape HTML bookmark export.

requestBody.description: Multipart body with a file field plus optional duplicatePolicy JSON and remapping JSON fields.

remapping.description: Optional JSON ImportRemappingInput. Folder create mappings use sourcePath and targetPath; folder existing mappings use sourcePath and categoryId. Tag existing mappings use sourceTag and tagId; new/renamed mappings use sourceTag and targetName; skipped mappings use only sourceTag.

422.description: Missing file or invalid bookmark export

get.summary: Stream import progress over Server-Sent Events.
Read current settings with secrets redacted and runtime capabilities.

put.summary: Deep-merge a settings patch into persisted settings.

post.summary: Test connectivity to the configured LLM provider.
Create a local backup snapshot and optionally upload it to S3.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

get.summary: List local backups and optionally merge remote S3 backups.
Read backup schedule settings and the computed next run time.

500.description: Schedule settings could not be saved

get.summary: Read the effective backup directory and writability.

put.summary: Set or clear the custom local backup directory.

500.description: Destination settings could not be saved

post.summary: Verify a local backup snapshot without restoring it.

400.description: Malformed JSON or non-object request body

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid verify request or backup validation failed

post.summary: Create an encrypted package file from a local backup snapshot.

400.description: Malformed JSON or non-object request body

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid package request or backup validation failed

post.summary: Verify an encrypted package file without restoring it.

400.description: Malformed JSON or non-object request body

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid package request, wrong password, or package validation failed

post.summary: Restore from a local backup directory, remote S3 snapshot, or encrypted package.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid restore request or backup validation failed

post.summary: Test connectivity to the configured S3 backup destination.

422.description: S3 is not configured or connection failed

get.summary: List managed local integration tokens with secret values redacted.

post.summary: Create a managed bearer token for an explicit local integration client.
post.description: The full token is returned only once. Store it in the client and use it as an Authorization bearer token. The JSON body is optional; omit it to create a token named `Local integration`.

post.summary: Rotate an active integration token and return the new bearer token once.
Handle MCP Streamable HTTP transport requests.
post.description: The daemon creates a fresh MCP server and transport for each request. MCP is a local integration surface and requires `Authorization: Bearer <integration-token>`.

401.description: Missing, invalid, rotated, or revoked integration token

favicon_url.description: Cached favicon media path or URL

screenshot_url.description: Cached page preview media path or URL

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

alt.description: Image alt text or preview label

BookmarkMediaSet.description: Cached local media available for a bookmark

favicon_url.description: Cached favicon media path or URL

screenshot_url.description: Cached page preview media path or URL

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

BookmarkAggregateCategory.description: Category aggregate count under the requested library filter context

BookmarkAggregateTag.description: Tag aggregate count under the requested library filter context

BookmarkAggregateDomain.description: Domain aggregate count under the requested library filter context

unread.description: Matching active bookmarks not marked read

no.description: Matching active bookmarks not marked read-later

total.description: Total active bookmarks matching the requested library filter context

url.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL to save

title.description: New title, or null to clear

category_id.description: Category ID, or null to clear

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

read_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time, or null to mark unread

notes.description: Personal notes, or null to clear

PipelineFailure.description: Latest actionable pipeline failure for a bookmark

stage.description: Pipeline stage that last reported an actionable failure

message.description: Failure message safe to show in the local UI

configuration_related.description: Whether the failure likely requires provider settings

retryable.description: Whether retrying the bookmark pipeline is supported

bookmark_id.description: Bookmark ID required when mode is selected

replace_ai_fields.description: When true, allow reprocessing to update AI-derived title, category, and tags; manual notes are never overwritten

skipped.description: Bookmarks skipped because work is already queued or running

status_url.description: Batch status URL when jobs were enqueued

favicon_url.description: Cached favicon media path or URL

screenshot_url.description: Cached page preview media path or URL

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

CategoryRecord.description: Category row returned by create and update endpoints

is_public.description: Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data

CategoryWithCount.description: Category row with active bookmark count returned by category listings

is_public.description: Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data
Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data

Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data

TagRecord.description: Tag row returned by create and attach endpoints

TagWithCount.description: Tag row with active bookmark count returned by tag listings

ImportDuplicatePolicy.description: Duplicate handling policy applied to an import preview or commit

sourcePath.description: Folder path from the imported file

action.description: Folder remapping action. Use create with targetPath or existing with categoryId.

categoryId.description: Existing category ID; required when action is existing

targetPath.description: Target path for create/reuse mappings. Child folders inherit remapped ancestor paths unless explicitly mapped.

sourceTag.description: Source tag name from the imported file

action.description: Tag remapping action. Use tagId for existing, targetName for new or renamed.

tagId.description: Existing tag ID; required when action is existing

targetName.description: Target tag name for new or renamed mappings; lowercase hyphen format, max 50 characters

ImportRemappingInput.description: Optional import remapping request JSON. Omitted folders and tags use the daemon's default create/reuse decisions.

sourcePath.description: Folder path from the imported file

targetCategoryId.description: Existing target category ID when mapped to an existing category

status.description: Whether the target category path already exists or will be created

sourceTag.description: Source tag name from the imported file

targetTagId.description: Existing target tag ID when reused

targetName.description: Resolved target tag name; null when skipped

status.description: Whether the target tag exists, will be created, or is skipped

ImportRemapping.description: Resolved category and tag remapping decisions applied to an import preview or commit

totalRows.description: Total parsed bookmark rows, including skipped invalid/private rows

new.description: Rows that would create new bookmarks

invalidUrls.description: Rows skipped because the URL is malformed or not HTTP(S)

privateUrls.description: Rows skipped because the URL targets a private or loopback host

created.description: Estimated rows created under the selected policy

merged.description: Estimated active duplicate rows merged under the selected policy

restored.description: Estimated archived or trashed duplicate rows restored and merged

skipped.description: Estimated rows skipped under the selected policy

action.description: Action that the selected policy would apply

notes.description: Source note text when the import format provides note-like metadata

targetCategoryId.description: Mapped target category ID when it already exists

skipReason.description: Reason the row would be skipped

totalRows.description: Total parsed bookmark rows, including skipped invalid/private rows

created.description: Bookmarks created by the committed import

updated.description: Existing bookmarks updated by merge or restore actions

merged.description: Active duplicate bookmarks merged by the committed import

restored.description: Archived or trashed duplicate bookmarks restored and merged

skipped.description: Rows skipped by validation or duplicate policy

failed.description: Rows that failed during commit after import processing started

warnings.description: Parser and row-level warnings included in the result report

categoriesCreated.description: Categories created from imported folder paths

categoriesReused.description: Existing categories reused for imported folder paths

action.description: Requested action selected by the duplicate policy

notes.description: Source note text when the import format provides note-like metadata

targetCategoryId.description: Mapped target category ID when it already exists

existingBookmarkId.description: Matching existing bookmark ID from preview analysis

bookmarkId.description: Bookmark ID created or updated by the committed import row

warning.description: User-visible row warning, duplicate note, remapping note, or skipped-row reason

error.description: User-visible row error when commit processing failed for this row

ImportResultReport.description: Final import result report available when progress is done

restored.description: Existing archived or trashed bookmarks restored and merged

failed.description: Rows that failed during commit after import processing started

categoriesCreated.description: Categories created from imported folder paths

categoriesReused.description: Existing categories reused for imported folder paths

enabled.description: Whether this runtime feature is usable

Number of local snapshots to retain

is_custom.description: Whether a custom destination is active

writable.description: Whether the daemon can write to this directory

path.description: Absolute custom backup path, or empty string to reset

skip_remote.description: When true, create only the local snapshot and skip S3 upload

password.description: Password used to encrypt the package

path.description: Absolute encrypted package file path under the configured backup directory

password.description: Password used to decrypt the package

items.description: Verified backup file path relative to the backup directory

checksum_verified.description: Whether checksum verification succeeded after decryption

items.description: Verified backup file path relative to the package archive

path.description: Absolute encrypted package file path under the configured backup directory

password.description: Password used to decrypt the encrypted package

allow_unsafe_no_checksum.description: Allow restoring a backup with no checksum file

restart_command.description: Platform-specific command for restarting littleimpd when detectable

health_url.description: Local health endpoint to poll after restarting the daemon

Diagnostics.description: Redacted local diagnostics payload for user-shared support bundles

frontend_dist.description: Static frontend directory when served by the daemon

done.description: Completed jobs retained in the queue table

failed.description: Failed jobs retained in the queue table

configured.description: Whether LLM enrichment can run with current settings

base_url.description: Resolved or selected LLM base URL with credentials, query strings, and fragments removed

configured.description: Whether embedding-backed features can run with current settings

base_url.description: Resolved or selected embedding base URL with credentials, query strings, and fragments removed

is_custom.description: Whether a custom backup destination is active

writable.description: Whether the effective local backup directory is writable

configured.description: Whether enough non-secret S3 fields and stored credentials are present

endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL with credentials, query strings, and fragments removed; empty string for AWS

items.description: Secret class or sensitive URL component intentionally omitted from diagnostics

tag.description: Release tag from the update source

prerelease.description: Whether the release is marked as a prerelease

update_available.description: Whether a compatible release is newer than the current version

source.description: Release source URL used for the check

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

is_archived.description: Archived flag, 0 or 1; /export currently returns active rows, so emitted rows are 0

IntegrationTokenRecord.description: Managed local integration token metadata. Full bearer token values are returned only at creation or rotation.

token_prefix.description: Redacted token prefix for display and support

last_used_at.description: Most recent successful token use timestamp

IntegrationTokenCreateResult.description: One-time integration token creation or rotation result

token.description: Full bearer token. Store it now; it is never returned by list endpoints.

localIntegrationBearer.description: Managed local integration bearer token created with POST /integration-tokens.
